content.text:
I can see the permission management page with 4 items, all with red X marks (denied):
1. 音乐和音频 (Music and Audio) - denied
2. 短信 (SMS) - denied
3. 附近设备 (Nearby Devices) - denied
4. 其他权限 (Other permissions)

I need to enable all of them. Let me click on "音乐和音频" first.
